titleStmt.title: SII 30.255: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 255. (A.R. No. 607 of 1915.) Malaiyaḍikkuṟichchi, Sankaranayinārkoil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Rock-cut temple of Mahādēva-on the south wall Māṟ. Śrīvallabha-Pāṇḍya: year 3: 1148 A.D.

summary.p: Incomplete. It registers the gift (one vēli and three mā) of land which includes the previous gift of half vēli and one mā of land to the temple of Piṇakkaṟukku[m] mahādēva at Malaiyaḍik-kuṟichchi, the southern hamlet of Śri Parāntakachchaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Āri-nāḍu by the Pāṇḍya ruler Māṟavarmaṉ Śrivallabhadēva. This land was located near Māṉābharaṇap-pērēri, Sīdēvi-vāykkāl, and Vīrapāṇḍyaṉ-pilāṟu. While ordering this grant of dēvadāṉa-iṟaiyili, the king was seated in his throne called Muṉaiyadaraiyaṉ, in his palace at Tirunelvēli in Kīḻvēṁba-nāḍu. Below this an incomplete record dated in the 11th year of the king Srīvallabha dēva, is found.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
makaḷ poṟpuyan tiḷaippa kaḷava
yiṉ Irunilamuḻutum Orukuṭai niḻaṟṟa
karuṅkali kaṭintu ceṅkolocci Ettaruṅ ki cetu
Iriya toḻil naṭātti pārttivar veṉṟi mura
yorucilai Iriyap puliyel car kaṇa
vīrāpiṣeka muṟaimaiyil
maṇi vīrasimhāsanattu vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrīkomā
tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvallapadevarkku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu kīḻ
vempūr nāṭṭut tirunelveliyileḻuntaruḷiyirun=ta Uḷḷālai paḷḷiyaṟai
kūṭattil paḷḷikkaṭṭil muṉaiyataraiyanileḻun=taruḷiyiruntu Ārināṭṭu
brahmadeyam śrīparān=takacaturvvedimaṅkalattu teṉpiṭākai malaiyaṭikku
ṟicci piṇakkaṟukkumahādevar koyilil devarkaṉmiyum cimāhe
śvarakaṇkāṇi ceyvaār nām ceyya tiruvāymoḻin=taruḷiṉapaṭi Idevarkku
tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷ celvatāka Ivvūril māṉaā para
ṇappereriyil kiḷa kkālukku kiḷakku citevi vākkālu
kku teṟku paḻanattattukku vaṭakku vīrapāṇṭiyaṉ pilāṟṟu
kku meṟkum Innāṉkellai Uṭpaṭa munpu Aiyyan Iṟai
nilam Araiye Orumāvum Āka nilam Oṉṟe muṉṟumāvum I
ṟaippaṭi muṉpu Aiyaṉ kuṭuttapaṭi nām munṟāvatu mutal In
nilam kārāḷmey Āḷcilavu An=tarāyam Uṭpaṭa tevatāna
Iṟaiyili Āka namkeḷviyum nam variyilār Eḻuttiṭa U
ḷvariyum taraccoṉnom nam keḷvippaṭiye kallilum ce
mpilum veṭṭikkoḷka Eṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷinār
veḻi Āṟṟūr Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Intira māna valla
varaiyaṉ Eḻuttu ..yāṇṭu patinoṉṟu 10 1 nāḷ 100 4 10 3 nāl
kiḷvempanāṭṭu tirunelveli Uḷḷālai paḷḷiaṟaik
kūṭattup paḷḷippīṭattu Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu Ārināṭṭu bra
hmadeyam śrīparāntaka caturvvetimaṅkalattu teṉpiṭākai
malaiyaṭikkuṟicciyil piṇakkaṟukkumahādevar koyilil te
varkaṉmiyum māhesvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvānum ceyya tiruvāy
moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Ivvūr pulka Ammai ku kku El
lai kku kiḷakkum vaṭavellai mānāparaṇa
Digital edition of SII 30.255 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
